rule_category: Evidence Support Type + Writer Release Logic
description: Safety claim without RMF/GSPR alignment. Claim has clinical evidence but lacks the required risk management documentation linkage.

input.ifu_text: Device is safe for use in anticoagulated patients.

available_evidence.findings: No major bleeding events. Minor oozing in 5/90 (5.6%).

missing_documentation.issue: Safety claim requires RMF hazard analysis and GSPR checklist alignment for anticoagulated patient subpopulation.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Clinical evidence supports safety in anticoagulated patients, but RMF hazard analysis and GSPR alignment for this specific subpopulation are missing. Risk control documentation required before strong conclusion.

cer_reasoning_ledger.gap_rationale: RMF/GSPR alignment missing for anticoagulated patient subpopulation. Risk control documentation needed.

writer_must_include: limitation: RMF alignment pending for anticoagulated subgroup
